name: mindtrain
description: Build and query private knowledge catalogs, then run conversational spaced-repetition training with MindTrain.

interface.shortDescription: Build and search private training knowledge catalogs
interface.longDescription: Configure a private MindTrain instance, query its knowledge catalog, create user-approved training domains from AI dialogue or local references, then begin conversational training and review.
defaultPrompt: Use $mindtrain to show my training domains and knowledge points.
Use $mindtrain to create a training domain after I confirm its topic tree.
Use $mindtrain to start today's training session.
